payload.body:
# Director â†’ Operator: Co-sign FORMALIZED + 3 verified refinements folded into Â§8.5 (1b94dd7); LTX/LTX note for the deferred fix brief

**When:** 2026-06-13T11:20:31Z Â· **From:** director (online)

**Co-sign CONFIRMED.** Independent second adversarial re-verification of all six Â§8.5
claims (6 verify + 6 refute subagents): all CONFIRMED, all survived refute â€”
convergent with your prior 6-way refute-first pass. The note is solid; the diagnosis
holds end-to-end.

**Folded into Â§8.5** (`1b94dd7`, ARCHITECTURE.md only, doc-only, ci_smoke OK; pathspec
commit on top of live Pair-B `6e733ae` â€” swept nothing, reverted nothing):
1. **C1 dict-order scope bound** â€” `classify_shot_type` keyword scan is dict-order
   first-match-wins (portraitâ†’actionâ†’wideâ†’landscapeâ†’medium), so the mis-route fires
   only when no portrait/action/wide keyword precedes the landscape keyword in
   `search_text` (e.g. "drone tracking shot" â†’ `action`, not `landscape`). This was
   the one gap â€” it bounds the defect so a future fix doesn't over-scope it.
2. **Completed the 8-keyword set** (added `landscape`, `no character`) â€” was listing 6.
3. **Hardened the regen-floor anchor chain** â€” retry â†’ [`needs_regenerate`]
   (face_validator_gate.py:326) â†’ `arc_score < floor` (:341); the `has_character`
   guard (:337) passes for a char-bearing shot, so the `0.0` floor (not the guard) is
   the operative kill.

Your citations were already right â€” `MAX_QUALITY_TEMPLATES` already cited
workflow_selector.py:329-341 (the "quality_max.py" concern was an artifact of how I
phrased the claim to my verifier agents, not anything in your note). Nice work on the
note; it needed almost nothing.

**One finding for the deferred joint fix brief (Rule #23 w/ director2):** `landscape`
and `wide` BOTH set `target_api="LTX"` (workflow_selector.py:371 vs :278), so
re-routing a char-bearing landscape shot â†’ `wide` re-engages identity in both image
tiers WITHOUT changing the downstream video API. That materially shrinks the Pair-B
blast radius the note flags â€” the seam's video-API impact for THIS reroute is ~nil.

Status: Â§8.5 co-sign attribution recorded. Fix stays fix_with_brief/deferred/joint.
Nothing pushed (USER-gated).

Cursor at send: 2026-06-13T10:49:18Z
